question: Which language is the most popular in Aruba?
gold_sql: SELECT T2.Language FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code  =  T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Name  =  "Aruba" ORDER BY Percentage DESC LIMIT 1
predicted_sql: SELECT T2.text_1 FROM table_3 AS T1 JOIN table_4 AS T2 ON T1.pk_1 = T2.pk_1 WHERE T1.text_1 = 'Aruba' ORDER BY T2.num_1 DESC LIMIT 1;
raw_response: SELECT T2.text_1 FROM table_3 AS T1 JOIN table_4 AS T2 ON T1.pk_1 = T2.pk_1 WHERE T1.text_1 = 'Aruba' ORDER BY T2.num_1 DESC LIMIT 1;
